data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the insurance requirement verification, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is met. The linked use case states that an insurance certificate is required two weeks before the event, yet no evidence of an insurance certificate being submitted or verified is present in the prior steps. This indicates a clear gap in the validation of the insurance requirement, as the necessary checks were not performed or documented.
gaps: No evidence of insurance certificate submission or verification.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
